title: Seeing Hollow in a Dream: Meaning and Interpretation
seoDescription: Learn about the psychological and spiritual meaning of seeing Hollow in a dream. The messages of the Hollow dream regarding your life.
introduction: The Hollow dream indicates that your intuitions are trying to guide you. Analyzing this symbol can help clarify the uncertainties in your life.
symbolism: Hollow symbolizes the process of change and adaptation psychologically. The details seen in the dream provide clues about which area of your life (work, relationship, health) this change will occur.
cosmicAnalysis:
This dream carries 4 different cosmic messages according to the phases of the Moon:

**🌑 New Moon:** Emptiness heralds new beginnings. During this period, you should listen to your inner intuitions and open the door to new opportunities that will fill the voids in your life.

**🌓 Waxing Moon:** At this stage, it is time to turn your inner changes into concrete steps. The feeling of emptiness can be used as a source of motivation for growth and development; you should find the courage to pursue new projects or relationships.

**🌕 Full Moon:** In this phase where the emptiness is illuminated, an opportunity is presented to clarify your feelings or uncertainties that have remained in the dark. During this time when your inner transformation reaches its peak, it is possible to determine a new direction by evaluating the insights you have gained.

**🌗 Waning Moon:** This period is a time to leave behind your past experiences and break free from old patterns. The emptiness is an invitation to open a new page by freeing yourself from the burdens of the past; during this process, you must let go of everything that holds you back.
commonScenarios: Being chased by Hollow: Indicates that you are avoiding a part of yourself or a responsibility.
Finding a hollow: Represents the discovery of a hidden talent, opportunity, or resource.
Being hollow: Signifies that this trait or power has become a part of you.
cta: What does the Hollow dream mean for you? Get your personal analysis immediately with Dream Boat.
